fields.description:
## Why
Collapse the reviewer-centric model into the unified prompt model: reviewers become a SUBSET of
prompts; the catalog becomes a generated derived index. Validated by spike E5.

## What
- Migrate the 6 reviewers' `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/catalog.json` metadata into per-file front-matter
  using S2's writer (`src/rebar/llm/reviewers/*.md`).
- Generalize `get_reviewer` -> `resolve_prompt` in `src/rebar/llm/prompts.py`. EXPLICIT new signature:
  `resolve_prompt(prompt_id: str) -> Prompt` where `Prompt` exposes `{id, text, inputs, outputs,
  execution_mode, category, is_reviewer, dimension, applies_to}`; it raises `PromptNotFound` for an
  unknown id. Resolution order: project `.rebar/prompts/<id>.md` override > built-in packaged. Reviewer
  membership is EXPLICIT (`category: review` / reviewer flag), NEVER inferred from output-schema shape.
  MIGRATE the sole consumer `runs.py:RunnerAgentStep.run()` (calls `get_reviewer` at ~line 130) to
  `resolve_prompt`; remove `get_reviewer`.
- Build the GENERATED + COMMITTED derived-index (scan front-matter -> index) enforcing invariants
  (exactly-one default; no `dimension` collision; preserve `langfuse_prompt`/`fallback_file`/
  `applies_to`). A RETIRE path: a removed prompt is dropped from the index on regeneration. Add a CI
  drift gate (`regenerate + git diff --exit-code`) in `.github/workflows/test.yml`. `applies_to` keeps
  stdlib `fnmatch`.

## Scope
In: migration + resolver(+removal) + index(+retire) + CI gate + regression-equivalence. Out: prompt
CONTRACTS in the runner (S4), editor library (S6).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The 6 reviewers carry front-matter; `resolve_prompt(id)` resolves project>built-in and returns the unified `Prompt`; reviewer flag explicit.
- [ ] `get_reviewer` is REMOVED, `catalog.json` is removed/fully-derived, and a grep confirms no remaining `get_reviewer` callers (caller migration complete).
- [ ] Derived index generated+committed; invariants enforced (two-default AND dimension-collision rejections both tested); a removed prompt is retired from the index; CI drift gate fails on a stale index.
- [ ] Existing reviewer behavior preserved (resolution/default/applies_to routing) — equivalence regression tests green.
